scripts.test:bdd: npm run bddgen && SMOKE_ONLY=1 playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts
scripts.test:bdd:api: npm run bddgen && SMOKE_ONLY=1 playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-api
scripts.test:bdd:ui: npm run bddgen && SMOKE_ONLY=1 playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-ui-chromium --project=bdd-ui-firefox --project=bdd-ui-webkit
scripts.test:bdd:ui:chromium: npm run bddgen && SMOKE_ONLY=1 playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-ui-chromium
scripts.test:bdd:ui:firefox: npm run bddgen && SMOKE_ONLY=1 playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-ui-firefox
scripts.test:bdd:ui:webkit: npm run bddgen && SMOKE_ONLY=1 playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-ui-webkit
scripts.debug:bdd:ui: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --ui
scripts.debug:bdd:ui:api: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-api --ui
scripts.debug:bdd:ui:chromium: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=bdd-ui-chromium --ui
scripts.debug:bdd:trace:on: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --trace on
